title: holocheilus illustris
intro: Holocheilus illustris, also known as the Chinese lantern plant, is a flowering plant species in the family Celastraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Chinese traditional medicine, due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Holocheilus illustris is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its extracts can be used in various herbal preparations, including capsules, tablets, and teas.
